verses.text: Tua ciangin Josef' tapate sung panin Manasseh' tapa Makhir, Makhir' tapa Gilead, Gilead' tapa Hefer, Hefer' tapa Zelofehad' tanute a nai-ah hong pai uh hi. Ama tanute' minte in: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah, leh Tirzah ahi hi
Amaute, Moses' mai leh siampi Eleazar' mai leh makaite' mai leh mihonte khempeuh' mai, kikhopna bukkongah ding uh a
“Ka pa uh gamlakah a si hi. Korah tawh kipawlin Topa langpangin a kikaikhawm mihonte lakah amah kihello hi. Ahih hangin ama khialhna hangin si a, amah in tapa neilo hi
Amah in tapa a neihloh man bekin bang hangin a beh sung panin ka pa uh' min mangthang ding ahi hiam? Ka pa uh sanggamte' lakah kote zong neihsa hong pia un,” a ci uh hi
Moses in Topa' mai-ah amau' thu a gen hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Zelofehad' tanute' thugen man hi. Amau' pa' sanggamte lakah neihsa gamh amaute tungah na pia ding a, amau' pa' gamh amaute' tungah na tungsak ding hi
Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: ‘Pasal khat si-in, tapa a neih kei leh, ama gamh a tanu na luahsak ding uh hi
Amah in tanu a neih kei leh, ama gamh a sanggam pasalte tungah na tungsak ding uh hi
Amah in sanggam pasal a neih kei leh, ama gamh ama pa' sanggam pasalte tungah na pia ding uh hi

Ama pa in sanggam pasal a neih kei leh, ama gamh ama innkuan tawh a kinai ama behpa' tungah na pia ding uh a, amah in tang ding hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin hih pen Israel mite tungah thukham leh ngeina kip hi ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Moses in Amah Laih dingin Joshua Seh

verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih Abarim mual tungah paito in la, Israel mite' tungah ka piak leitang en in
Na muh khit ciangin na sanggampa Aaron mah bangin nang zong na mite kiang na zuan ta ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh
mihonpite a kitot lai-un tui phualah keimah sian'thosak ding hunin Zin gamlakah keima thu nong lehpan' hi,” a ci hi. (Hihte pen Zin gamlak, Kadesh gam Meribah tui-a thupiangte a cihna ahi hi
Moses in Topa kiangah

“Topa' mihonte, a cing neilo tuute a batlohna dingin amaute' mai-ah paikhia-in amaute' mai-ah a tum ding, amaute paikhiatpihin amaute a ciahpih ding, mihonte a uk dingin, Topa, mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian ahi nangmah in mi khat seh in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nun' tapa Joshua, siamna a nei mipa la in la, ama tungah na khut nga in
Siampi Eleazar leh mihon khempeuh mai-ah amah na dingsak ding a, amaute' muhna-ah amah za na pia ding hi
Israel mihon khempeuh in ama thu a man' theihna dingin thuneihna pawlkhat amah na guan' ding hi

Siampi Eleazar' mai-ah amah ding ding a, amah in Topa' mai-ah Urim thukhenna tawh thu dotsak ding hi. Amah leh amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh, mihon buppi, ama thu tawh pusuak ding uh a, ama thu mah tawh sungtum ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses gamta a, amah in Joshua la-in siampi Eleazar leh mihon buppi mai-ah dingsak a
amah in ama tungah a khutte nga-in, Topa in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua tungah za a pia hi.
